name: kapture
description: Kapture browser automation bridge scaffold for the edgars-mcp plugin registry.

interface.shortDescription: Browser automation via the Kapture Chrome extension.
interface.longDescription: Registers the Kapture MCP bridge for multi-client browser control through the Kapture Chrome extension and its WebSocket-backed MCP server.
defaultPrompt: Use Kapture to drive the current browser tab.
Connect a Kapture tab and inspect the page state.
Run a browser automation step through Kapture.
